perks.name: Scion
perks.description: As a Vampire Lord, gain a 50 point bonus to all attributes (Health, Magicka, Stamina).

perks.name: Unearthly Will
perks.description: As a Vampire Lord, all spells and powers cost 25% less to cast.

perks.name: Night Cloak
perks.description: As a Vampire Lord, a cloud of bats absorbs 5 Health per second from each nearby living enemy in combat.

perks.name: Energy Vampire
perks.description: As a Vampire Lord, your attacks also absorb Magicka and your damaging spells also absorb Stamina.

perks.name: Shapechanger
perks.description: As a Vampire Lord, your attacks weaken targets to your damaging spells and your damaging spells weaken targets to your attacks, increasing damage by 25% for 10 seconds.

perks.name: Vampiric Grip
perks.description: Blood Magic: Pulls a living target to you from a distance, absorbing Health and Stamina at close range.

perks.name: Fountain of Blood
perks.description: Draining a person or killing a person with a power attack bite restores three times as much Health and also restores Magicka and Stamina.

perks.name: Slasher
perks.description: As a Vampire Lord, your power attacks are 25% stronger and hit all targets in front of you.

perks.name: Hemomancer
perks.description: Vampiric blood spells deal 0.4% more damage per level of Destruction.

perks.name: Blood Storm
perks.description: As a Vampire Lord, upgrades your Raze spell to Blood Storm, which deals 15% more damage and can be held down for rapid fire.

perks.name: Auspex
perks.description: Your Vampiric senses warn you when enemies approach within 150 feet, briefly revealing them.

perks.name: Court's Chef
perks.description: Able to create a variety of beneficial Potions from Human Flesh or Human Hearts at a cooking pot.

perks.name: Wings of the Strix
perks.description: As a Vampire Lord, sprinting in caster stance allows you to glide, greatly reducing fall speed.

perks.name: Maelstrom
perks.description: Blood Magic: Vortex pulls targets within range to the center, briefly weakening them to magic.

perks.name: Gutwrench
perks.description: Blood Magic: Absorb Health from nearby living targets, tearing them apart when maintained for long enough.

perks.name: Mist Form
perks.description: Night Power: Turn into invisible and invulnerable mist, regenerating Health, Magicka and Stamina.

perks.name: Supernatural Reflexes
perks.description: Night Power: Slow time as you move and attack faster and your power attacks knock targets down.

perks.name: Tremor
perks.description: Night Power: Shake the earth, staggering nearby targets and throwing them into the air.

perks.name: Vampiric Seed
perks.description: Mortal Hemomancy: Bone shards pierce a living target, absorbing Health and dealing magic damage.

perks.name: Vampiric Orb
perks.description: Mortal Hemomancy: Impales living targets in the area, absorbing Health and dealing magic damage.

perks.name: Vampiric Cloak
perks.description: Mortal Hemomancy: Bats attack living targets. Absorbs Health and deals magic damage.

perks.name: Blood From a Stone
perks.description: Vampiric blood spells can now damage nonliving targets.

perks.name: Starving Artist
perks.description: Vampiric blood spells absorb Stamina equal to 50% of damage dealt.

perks.name: Make Them Beautiful
perks.description: Vampiric blood spells tear apart targets below 25% Health, killing them instantly.
